bdtree:item-handbooktext-boat-sailed-*:
Sailboats are built on land, then launched into the water. They cannot be picked up. They can be dismantled by holding rightmouse with a saw. See the Sailboat Construction section for more information.

Movement
After building the boat, rightmouse the rear right seat (by the tiller at the stern) to sit: only this seat allows steering the boat. With sails furled, you can move slowly using standard movement keys. rightmouse the cleat on the side of the mast (where the rope is attached) to unfurl the sail and increase speed. Currently, the boat does not react to wind direction, only to your movement keys.

If the boat runs aground or is in too shallow water, it can be moved very slowly using the arrow keys, but only with the sail furled.

Equipment
Most accessories are added to the boat via ctrl + rightmouse.
The boat can also carry several passengers — one passenger can sit on the rear left seat (next to the player at the helm). Additional seats can be placed in any of the eight cargo slots.

You can place containers (including chests, baskets, and storage vessels) in the boat's hold and use them both on and off the boat.

You can also place an animal (e.g., an elk) on the boat by first placing a wooden fence post in one of the cargo slots — leaving 2 cargo slots behind the post empty — then using a rope on that post, which will move the animal to the rear cargo slots. You can then disembark the animal by rightmouse on the post.

You can attach a lantern to the back side of the mast (about 3 meters high) to provide lighting.

Ratlines can be attached to the sides on both sides of the mast to climb to the top of the mast and look around.

An anchor can be placed at the front left spot on the bow (although it currently doesn't function).

There is also a spot on the bow for a figurehead (you can also install your own carved figure), and on the left bow you can name the boat (using pigment and shift + rightmouse).
bdtree:item-handbooktext-boat-raft-*:
- Place the raft with rightmouse.
- rightmouse the raft to sit on it.
- While holding an oar in the active slot, you can steer the raft.
- Dismount the raft using shift.
- Pick up the raft using shift + rightmouse.
